query:
SELECT ci.item_key, ci.amount, ci.funding_source, ci.assigned_phase, ci.payment_method, ci.lump_sum_month, ci.section
FROM cf_cost_items ci
JOIN cf_scenarios cs ON ci.scenario_id = cs.id
WHERE cs.project_id = 4 AND cs.scenario_type = 'offplan_escrow'
ORDER BY ci.section, ci.item_key;
